description: Reopened event. Should dispatch like a fresh opened with history context.

issue.title: [Bug] Electron 35.0.0 regression on Windows 11
issue.body:
Reopening — the fix in #130 didn't actually resolve it. New repro:

1. Install Electron 35.0.0 (latest).
2. Launch on Windows 11 22H2.
3. Window fails to render — black screen for 5s then crash.

expected.rationale: Reopened — dispatch like opened but with prior history; existing labels are already correct
